title: India Swaps Turn More Aggressive on Rate Hikes, Boosting Yields
summary: India’s swap markets are signaling a more aggressive shift toward interest-rate increases as oil prices surge, pointing to prospects for further gains in bond yields.

title: Global LNG Exports Fall to Six-Month Low on Iran Conflict
summary: Global liquefied natural gas exports declined to a six—month low, erasing recent supply additions from the US and elsewhere as the conflict in the Middle East throttles flows.

title: Aramco CEO Withdraws From Houston Event to Deal With Iran War
summary: Saudi Aramco Chief Executive Officer Amin Nasser has withdrawn from a major energy conference in Houston, which is due to start Monday, as the situation in the Middle East threatens to escalate further.
